items.title: Dua After Adhan
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ هَذِهِ الدَّعْوَةِ التَّامَّةِ، وَالصَّلَاةِ الْقَائِمَةِ، آتِ مُحَمَّدًا الْوَسِيلَةَ وَالْفَضِيلَةَ، وَابْعَثْهُ مَقَامًا مَحْمُودًا الَّذِي وَعَدْتَهُ.
items.transliteration: Allahumma Rabba haadhihid-da‘watit-taammah, was-salaatil-qaa’imah, aati Muhammadanil-waseelata wal-fadeelah, wab‘ath-hu maqaamam-mahmoodanil-lathee wa‘adtah.
items.translation: O Allah, Lord of this perfect call and the established prayer, grant Muhammad the highest rank and distinction, and raise him to the praised station You have promised him.

items.title: Morning Dua
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا وَبِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا وَبِكَ نَحْيَا وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ النُّشُورُ
items.transliteration: Allahumma bika asbahna wa bika amsayna wa bika nahya wa bika namootu wa ilaykan-nushoor.
items.translation: O Allah, by You we enter the morning and by You we enter the evening, by You we live and by You we die, and to You is the resurrection.

items.title: Before Sleep Dua
items.translation: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.

items.title: Sayyid al-Istighfar
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ...
items.transliteration: Allahumma anta Rabbi la ilaha illa anta, khalaqtani wa ana ‘abduka, wa ana ‘ala ‘ahdika wa wa‘dika mastata‘tu...
items.translation: O Allah, You are my Lord, none has the right to be worshipped except You. You created me and I am Your servant, and I abide by Your covenant and promise as best I can.

items.title: Dua for Parents
items.translation: My Lord, have mercy upon them as they brought me up when I was small.

items.title: Dua for Guidance
items.translation: Guide us to the straight path.

items.title: When Leaving Home
items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
items.transliteration: Bismillahi, tawakkaltu ‘alallahi, wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa بالله.
items.translation: In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah, and there is no might and no power except with Allah.

items.title: Entering the Masjid
items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، وَالصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ، اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
items.transliteration: Bismillah, was-salatu was-salamu ‘ala Rasoolillah. Allahumma iftah li abwaba rahmatik.
items.translation: In the name of Allah, and peace and blessings be upon the Messenger of Allah. O Allah, open for me the doors of Your mercy.

items.title: Leaving the Masjid
items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، وَالصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
items.transliteration: Bismillah, was-salatu was-salamu ‘ala Rasoolillah. Allahumma inni as’aluka min fadlik.
items.translation: In the name of Allah, and peace and blessings be upon the Messenger of Allah. O Allah, I ask You for Your bounty.

items.title: If You Forgot Bismillah
items.translation: In the name of Allah, at its beginning and at its end.

items.title: After Meals – Praise
items.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا، وَرَزَقَنِيهِ، مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
items.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi at‘amani hadha, wa razaqanihi, min ghayri hawlin مني wa la quwwah.
items.translation: Praise is to Allah who fed me this and provided it for me without any power or strength from myself.

items.title: After Meals – We Are Muslims
items.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنَا وَسَقَانَا وَجَعَلَنَا مُسْلِمِينَ
items.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi at‘amana wa saqana wa ja‘alana muslimeen.
items.translation: All praise belongs to Allah, who fed us, quenched our thirst, and made us Muslims.

items.title: After Meals – Blessing
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيهِ وَأَطْعِمْنَا خَيْرًا مِنْهُ
items.transliteration: Allahumma barik lana fihi wa at‘imna khayran minhu.
items.translation: O Allah, bless it for us and provide us with better than it.

items.title: Before Salam
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ، وَمِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni a‘oodhu bika min ‘adhabi jahannam, wa min ‘adhabil-qabr, wa min fitnatil-mahya wal-mamat, wa min sharri fitnatil-maseehid-dajjal.
items.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of Hellfire, the punishment of the grave, the trials of life and death, and the evil trial of the False Messiah.

items.title: Dua Qunoot
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي فِيمَنْ هَدَيْتَ، وَعَافِنِي فِيمَنْ عَافَيْتَ، وَتَوَلَّنِي فِيمَنْ تَوَلَّيْتَ، وَبَارِكْ لِي فِيمَا أَعْطَيْتَ، وَقِنِي شَرَّ مَا قَضَيْتَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma ihdini feeman hadayt, wa ‘afini feeman ‘afayt, wa tawallani feeman tawallayt, wa barik li feema a‘tayt, wa qini sharra ma qadayt.
items.translation: O Allah, guide me among those You have guided, grant me well-being among those You have granted well-being, take me into Your care among those You have taken into Your care, bless for me what You have given, and protect me from the evil of what You have decreed.

items.title: Du'a for Relief from Worry and Debt
Du'a for Beneficial Knowledge, Good Provision, and Accepted Deeds
